gigapan.description:
Here was the first people-sized studio I set up.  This was for the events on Thursday night.

In the gigapan of the studio on Saturday I used the flash units to light the room for the meta-gigapan (http://gigapan.org/gigapans/61597/).  This one used ambiant light.

The lights look lit because of the 75 watt incadescent work lights they have.  The other studio gigapan shows the room lit by the flash units.
